label: global analysis
evidence: Global analysis = calculus/analysis on manifolds; Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold (3151 decls) covers smooth manifolds, tangent bundles, differential calculus there.

label: order theory
evidence: Mathlib/Order (18096 decls) is exactly the order-theory folder: posets, lattices, Galois connections, well-founded orders, etc.

label: categorical algebra
evidence: Categorical algebra = algebraic structures studied via category theory (abelian/preadditive/monoidal categories); Mathlib/CategoryTheory (38455 decls) is the whole-folder home.
